name: dev-workflow
description: Opinionated, polyglot development workflow for Claude Code. A language-agnostic spine (greenfield setup, strict TDD lifecycle, zero-downtime migration safety, feature-completion review loop, deterministic pre-commit gate) with per-language packs for Ruby on Rails (RuboCop, Brakeman, Bullet, RSpec) and Python (Ruff, Bandit, pytest; Django or FastAPI). Includes language-aware fixer sub-agents and a commit gate that dispatches on the project's marker file.
